pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 11 code, failing to utilize Java 17 features or enforce Java 17 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 17+ can lead to mismatched class file versions or missing module path support; release is the standard for modern JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the 'release' flag or may fail to compile against Java 17 toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version that supports Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or generate incorrect bytecode on Java 17 due to internal API changes.
